service.name: Mailchimp API
service.description_for_ai: Email marketing platform API. Manage subscriber lists, send campaigns, automate email sequences, track open rates. 500 contacts and 1000 emails/month free. Best for marketing emails and newsletters.

auth.how_to_get: Get API key at https://mailchimp.com/account/api — free account available

capabilities.description_for_ai: Add or update email subscriber in a list. Use for newsletter signup, lead capture.

merge_fields.description: Subscriber merge fields matching your audience schema: {FNAME: 'John', LNAME: 'Doe', PHONE: '+1234567890', COMPANY: 'Acme', BIRTHDAY: '01/15'}. Field names depend on your audience configuration.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send a previously created and scheduled email campaign to all subscribers. Campaign must be in 'save' or 'schedule' status.

campaign_id.description: Campaign ID from list_campaigns or create_campaign. Must be status=save.

agent_hints.dc: Replace {dc} in base URL with your datacenter code from API key suffix e.g. key us21 → dc=us21
agent_hints.list_id: Get list IDs from GET /lists endpoint. Each 'audience' has a unique list_id.
agent_hints.double_optin: status='pending' sends confirmation email (double opt-in). 'subscribed' adds directly (use for known users).
agent_hints.tags: Use tags array to segment subscribers: ['newsletter', 'vip', 'trial']
